v4Consolidation.releaseClaimBoundary: V4 P0-P8 consolidation can support GitHub engineering claims about owner-folded mainline architecture, six-stage release gates, clean export artifact, and fresh-install smoke. Public benchmark, external comparison, or 90/95 capability claims still require paired raw evidence, score protocol, cost, cache, and failure-recovery proof.
